positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical circular arrangement (mandala composition) of glowing bioluminescent flora and exotic deep-sea fauna. The central motif features stylized, intertwined coral structures, crystal formations, and exotic leaves. Deep midnight blue and abyssal indigo backgrounds contrast sharply with vibrant neon turquoise, electric magenta, and glowing emerald accents. Maximalist Art Nouveau illustration style, incorporating strong clean silhouettes and symmetrical radial symmetry, highly detailed digital painting, clean vector lines, high contrast, studio quality, suitable for screen printing on apparel, octane render, 8k.
negative: blurry, deformed, poorly drawn, cropped, amateur, text, watermark, signature, noise, grain, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, washed out, messy, realistic photorealism, human figure
